quality_flags.message: No governed contaminant legal-limit coverage is currently curated for family `mercury_food_contaminants` in jurisdiction `eu`.
No jurisdiction-specific contaminant legal limit matched the requested lane for `eu`.

notes: No governed contaminant legal-limit records matched the requested filters.
Jurisdiction-specific contaminant legal-limit gaps are surfaced explicitly instead of borrowing values from another authority or matrix.

action_items.title: Review occurrence context
action_items.summary: Review monitored occurrence context, high-attention foods, and trend signals before interpreting this metals family.
action_items.rationale: Occurrence context was reviewed against the governed mercury occurrence support record.

action_items.title: Review priority food groups
action_items.summary: Confirm that the highest-priority food groups and high-attention foods remain explicit in the review package.
action_items.rationale: Priority food groups and high-attention fish species were reviewed explicitly.

action_items.title: Review sensitive populations
action_items.summary: Confirm that sensitive-population context is reviewed explicitly before reviewer signoff is recorded.
action_items.rationale: Sensitive-population context was reviewed for pregnancy-related and child-focused advice.

action_items.title: Review commodity-focus prompts
action_items.summary: Work through the governed commodity- and population-focus prompts linked to this bundle.
action_items.rationale: Commodity-focus prompts were reviewed for tuna and other predatory fish.

action_items.title: Review occurrence data ledger entry
action_items.summary: Occurrence interpretation relies on governed monitoring-support context. Keep the governed scientific ledger rationale explicit in reviewer signoff.

action_items.title: Review sensitive population context ledger entry
action_items.summary: Sensitive-population focus remains prompt-based review context. Keep the governed scientific ledger rationale explicit in reviewer signoff.

action_items.title: Review trend signal ledger entry
action_items.summary: Trend signals remain qualitative review cues. Keep the governed scientific ledger rationale explicit in reviewer signoff.

action_items.title: Review governance links
action_items.summary: Confirm that source, method, legal, dataset, and reference-value links are sufficient for the intended review use.
action_items.rationale: Source, method, dataset, legal, and reference-value links were reviewed as governed context.

referenced_resources.description: Governed metals-occurrence registry used to provide monitoring and occurrence context.

Supporting resource cited by reviewer signoff for action review_occurrence_context.
Supporting resource cited by reviewer signoff for action review_priority_food_groups.

notes: Signoff packet is a reviewer-facing overlay on top of the metals monitoring interpretation bundle and does not change the underlying bundle content.
Waived actions remain explicitly visible so downstream reviewers can inspect accepted deviations from the default review sequence.
Signed-off status records closure of the governed review workflow only; it does not certify scientific correctness, submission readiness, or regulatory approval.
Attached legal-limit review snapshots remain visible in signoff so family-level partial or missing jurisdiction support cannot be mistaken for a complete legal-limit layer.
Illustrative reviewer packet for governed metals monitoring signoff.
